questions.question: Define and explain the differences between a Stack and a Queue data structure. Provide an example of each.
questions.hint: Use diagrams to illustrate your explanation

questions.question: Write a Python program to implement a Stack using a linked list. Include methods for push, pop, and peek operations.
questions.hint: Use descriptive variable names and include comments

questions.question: A queue is implemented using an array of size 5. Describe how you would handle the case where the queue is full and no more elements can be added. Explain your reasoning.
questions.hint: Consider the underlying data structure and potential modifications
